---
title: "Sources"
---

The pages for the current and past editions were reconstructed from the public Google Sites listed below. 

| Edition | Original URL | Detailed program URL |
|---|---|---|
| 2026 | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet26> | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet26/home/detailed-program> |
| 2025 | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet25/> | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet25/detailed-program> |
| 2024 | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet24/> | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet24/phynet24/detailed-program> |
| 2023 | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet23/> | <https://sites.google.com/view/physnet23/phynet23-program/detailed-program> |
